import React, { useEffect } from "react"; import "aos/dist/aos.css"; import AOS from "aos"; const About = () => { const [experience, setExperience] = useState(0); useEffect(() => { AOS.init({ duration: 1000, easing: "ease-in-out", once: true }); const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear(); setExperience(currentYear - 2018); if (window.PureCounter) { new window.PureCounter(); } }, []); return (
